steps.title: Model the line of best fit
steps.content: Instead of only tracing the graph by eye, use two points on the line of best fit. The line is approximately through $(0,72)$ and $(6,126)$.

steps.title: Predict at age 3
steps.content: The fitted line has slope about $9$ and intercept about $72$, so at $x=3$ the prediction is $72+9(3)=99$ centimeters.

steps.title: Round as requested
steps.content: The question asks for the nearest $10$ centimeters. $99$ rounds to $100$, so the predicted body length is $100$ centimeters.
